name: SteinGate: Tail-Sensitive Safe Reinforcement Learning via Stein Discrepancy
summary: arXiv:2607.13175v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safe reinforcement learning typically enforces safety by bounding expected cumulative costs, a criterion that often fails to detect rare but catast...
description: arXiv:2607.13175v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safe reinforcement learning typically enforces safety by bounding expected cumulative costs, a criterion that often fails to detect rare but catastrophic tail events. To overcome these limitations, this paper introduces SteinGate, a boundary-aware distributional safety certificate that replaces fragile tail fitting with a robust consistency chec...
author: Yassine Chemingui, Chenhua Fan, Honghao Wei, Janardhan Rao Doppa
